title: onobrychis crista-galli f. ligulifera
intro: Onobrychis crista-galli f. ligulifera, also known as the Spanish clover or fenugreek, is a variant of the fenugreek plant that belongs to the legume family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Onobrychis crista-galli f. ligulifera include reducing blood sugar levels, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include tea, capsules, and tinctures, which can be used to support various health conditions, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it as a treatment.
